title: Iran Navy Commander Announces Closure of Strait of Hormuz from Arabian Sea Side
summary: Iranian Navy Commander Shahram Irani announced the closure of the Strait of Hormuz from the Arabian Sea side.
contents:
# Iran Navy Commander Announces Closure of Strait of Hormuz from Arabian Sea Side

## Overview
Iranian Navy Commander Shahram Irani announced the closure of the Strait of Hormuz from the Arabian Sea side.

## Details
The announcement got made early Thursday by Shahram Irani, Commander of the Iranian Navy. This follows a U.S. blockade on Iranian ports that began April 13 to pressure Iran on its nuclear program. The closure impacts a critical chokepoint for global oil shipping amid ongoing naval tensions in the region.

## Location
Strait of Hormuz, Arabian Sea

## Source Context
Reporting referenced from coverage tracked by the @WarshipCam OSINT beat. The cited outlet provides additional context, attribution, and verification of the claims summarized above.

## Tags
Iran Navy, Strait of Hormuz, naval closure, Shahram Irani, Arabian Sea, US blockade
